quizzes.q: A departing administrator still has their access a week later. Which control failed?
quizzes.why: PS-4, Personnel Termination, revokes access the moment someone leaves.

quizzes.q: Which family is new in Revision 5 and governs personal-data processing?
quizzes.why: PT, PII Processing and Transparency, is the privacy family new in Revision 5.
